headline: Dress for Success New Orleans Partners With Entergy To Celebrate More Than 25 Years of Empowering Women

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $116
summary: Citigroup  analyst Ryan Levine   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $106 to $116.
